xwikidoc.name: SecurityAdvisoryApplicationTranslations
xwikidoc.creator: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.author: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.content:
# Class fields SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_status=statut SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_status_draft=Brouillon SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_status_completed=Complété SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_status_announced=Annoncé SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_status_disclosed=Publié SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_title1=Titre SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_title_hint=Titre de l'avertissement SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_product=produit SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_product_hint=Produit impacté (par exemple xwiki-platform, xwiki-rendering, application-change-request, etc.) ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_advisoryLink=Advisory Link SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_advisoryLink_hint=Lien vers l'avis github qui a été créé SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_computeEmbargo=Calculer le délai d'embargo SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_computeEmbargo_hint=Définit si le délai d'embargo doit être calculé automatiquement sur la base du numéro de version ou non. SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_embargoDate=Date de fin d'embargo SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_embargoDate_hint=Définis une date spécifique d'embargo : celle-ci est prise en compte seulement si le calcul automatique de la date d'embargo n'est pas coché. SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_cvss=Score CVSS SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_cvss_hint=Valeur du CVSS calculé sur la chaîne de caractères. ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_cvssScore=CVSS Score ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_cvssScore_hint=Score corresponding to the CVSS vector. ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_description=Description ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_description_hint=Full content of the advisory. ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_preventOverride=Prevent override ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_preventOverride_hint=Check to prevent overriding data in case of Github import. ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryImpactedPackageClass_ecosystem=Ecosystem ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryImpactedPackageClass_ecosystem_hint=Package ecosystem for the vulnerable package (e.g. Maven or NPM) ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryImpactedPackageClass_packageId=Package Identifier ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryImpactedPackageClass_packageId_hint=Identifier of the vulnerable package ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryImpactedPackageClass_vulnerableVersionRange=Vulnerable versions range ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryImpactedPackageClass_vulnerableVersionRange_hint=Range of versions of the given package that are affected by the vulnerability ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryImpactedPackageClass_patchedVersions=Patched versions ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryImpactedPackageClass_patchedVersions_hint=List of versions of the given package that have been patched ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryImpactedPackageClass_releasedVersions=Patched versions that are released ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryImpactedPackageClass_releasedVersions_hint=List of patched versions for which a release has been found ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryImpactedPackageClass_latestReleasedDate=Date of latest released version ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryImpactedPackageClass_latestReleasedDate_hint=Computed date of the latest release found
# Sheet keys securityadvisoryapplication.sheet.description=Cette page contrôle comment les pages de l'application Security Advisory sont affichées à la fois en mode consultation et édition. securityadvisoryapplication.sheet.noObject=La page courante n'a pas l'objet Security Advisory Application attendu. securityadvisoryapplication.sheet.noFields=L'application Security Advisory n'a aucun champ à afficher.
# Live table generic keys securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.doc.title=Titre de la page ### Missing: securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.doc.name=Page Name securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.doc.space=Espace ### Missing: securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.doc.fullname=Page full name securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.doc.location=Emplacement securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.doc.author=Dernier auteur securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.doc.creator=Créateur ### Missing: securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.doc.date=Date ### Missing: securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.doc.creationDate=Creation Date ### Missing: securityadvisoryapplication.livetable._avatar=Avatar ### Missing: securityadvisoryapplication.livetable._images=Images securityadvisoryapplication.livetable._attachments=Pièces jointes ### Missing: securityadvisoryapplication.livetable._actions=Actions securityadvisoryapplication.livetable._actions.edit=Modifier securityadvisoryapplication.livetable._actions.delete=Supprimer ### Missing: securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.emptyvalue=-
# Live table specific keys ### Missing: securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.status=status securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.title1=Titre securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.product=produit securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.mavenModules=Modules Maven securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.affectedVersions=Versions impactées securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.patchedVersions=Versions corrigées ### Missing: securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.advisoryLink=Advisory Link securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.jiraTickets=Tickets JIRA securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.computeEmbargo=Caluler la date d'embargo securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.embargoDate=Date d'embargo securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.cvss=Score CVSS ### Missing: securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.cvssScore=CVSS Score ### Missing: securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.description=Description
# Other keys ### Missing: securityadvisoryapplication.entry.name=Security Advisory Application securityadvisoryapplication.home.right.warning=L'' {0}espace relatif à la sécurité{1} est actuellement ouvert à tous les utilisateurs : vous devriez restreindre son accès.
# Configuration SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryConfigurationClass_embargoDurationUnit=Unité à utiliser pour le calcul de la date d'embargo SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryConfigurationClass_embargoDurationUnit.hint=L'unité utilisée est basée sur les valeurs ChronoUnit (par exemple minutes, hours, days, weeks, months, etc.) SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryConfigurationClass_defaultEmbargoDuration=Valeur de la durée à utiliser pour le calcul de l'embargo SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryConfigurationClass_defaultEmbargoDuration.hint=Cette valeur calculée, avec l'unité correspondante, sera ajoutée à la date de sortie de la dernière version bénéficiant de la correction pour l'avis de sécurité SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryConfigurationClass_securityGroup=Le groupe d'utilisateurs visés par les notifications d'avis SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryConfigurationClass_securityGroup.hint=Les utilisateurs de ce groupe recevront automatiquement des notifications quand un avis est prêt à être publié. ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryConfigurationClass_dataSpace=Security entries space location ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryConfigurationClass_dataSpace.hint=The reference of the space where to store security entries (default: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.SecurityEntries) ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryConfigurationClass_importerUser=Importer user ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryConfigurationClass_importerUser.hint=The user used as author for imported entries ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryConfigurationClass_githubToken=Github Token ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryConfigurationClass_githubToken.hint=The Github token to use for importing security advisories ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryConfigurationClass_githubRepositoriesSlug=Github Repositories ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryConfigurationClass_githubRepositoriesSlug.hint=The list of Github repositories to use in automatic import. The value can be a repository slug in the form orga/repo (e.g. xwiki/xwiki-platform) or it can be an organization (e.g. xwiki).
# Administration - configuration and data migration ### Missing: securityadvisoryapplication.admin.settings.heading=Configuration ### Missing: securityadvisoryapplication.admin.migration.heading=Data migration ### Missing: securityadvisoryapplication.admin.migration.description=Migrate existing security advisories to the new data model: the impacted packages are moved to dedicated objects and the CVE identifier is migrated. The migration runs as a background job and is safe to run multiple times. ### Missing: securityadvisoryapplication.admin.migration.candidates=Advisories still using the legacy data model: {0} ### Missing: securityadvisoryapplication.admin.migration.button=Migrate advisories ### Missing: securityadvisoryapplication.admin.migration.finish.success=The security advisories have been successfully migrated to the new data model. ### Missing: securityadvisoryapplication.admin.migration.finish.error=An error occurred while migrating some security advisories. See the log below for details. ### Missing: job.log.label.securityadvisory.datamigration=Migration log
# Sheet Explanations securityadvisoryapplication.sheet.nextstep.DRAFT=Vous éditez actuellement un brouillon de l'avis. Une fois complété, vous pouvez basculer son statut en "complété" grâce au bouton en haut de la page. securityadvisoryapplication.sheet.nextstep.COMPLETED=Maintenant que l'avis est complet, vous devriez l'annoncer sur le canal définit dans la politique de sécurité. Une fois l'avis annoncé, vous pouvez basculer son statut avec le bouton en haut de la page. securityadvisoryapplication.sheet.nextstep.ANNOUNCED=Cet avis a été annoncé. Il sera automatiquement marqué comme divulguable lorsque la date d'embargo sera atteinte. Il est possible que la date d'embargo ne soit pas encore calculée si les versions corrigées ne sont pas encore publiées. securityadvisoryapplication.sheet.nextstep.DISCLOSABLE=Cet avis peut maintenant être divulgué, selon sa date d'embargo. Vous devriez demander une référence CVE et le publier. Une fois fait, vous devez marquer l'avis comme divulgué avec le bouton en haut de la page. securityadvisoryapplication.sheet.nextstep.DISCLOSED=Cet avis a été divulgué et est maintenant publique. securityadvisoryapplication.sheet.severity=Sévérité
# Deprecated keys ### Missing: securityadvisoryapplication.dataSpace.title=Data
